scripts.build:indexes: node scripts/build-indexes.js --data-root data/internal && npm run build:public-data
scripts.validate:indexes: node scripts/validate-data-indexes.js --data-root data/internal && node scripts/validate-data-indexes.js --data-root public/data
scripts.validate:json: node scripts/validate-public-json.js --data-root data/internal && node scripts/validate-public-json.js --data-root public/data
scripts.test:e2e: playwright test tests/e2e/core-flows.spec.js tests/e2e/content-parity.spec.js tests/e2e/responsive.spec.js tests/e2e/feature-flags.spec.js tests/e2e/learning-map-route.spec.js tests/e2e/learning-map.spec.js tests/e2e/ai-workflows.spec.js
scripts.test:ui: npm run validate:design-contract && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:a11y
scripts.analyze:bundle: npm run build && vite-bundle-visualizer --output output/quality/bundle-report.html --template treemap --open false
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @curriculum/core run typecheck && npm --workspace @curriculum/client run typecheck && npm --workspace @curriculum/api run typecheck && tsc -p tsconfig.vercel.json --noEmit
scripts.deploy:vercel:checked: npm run deploy:vercel && npm run smoke:api:prod
scripts.test:api: npm run validate:json && npm run validate:indexes && npm run validate:data-contract && npm run validate:public-data && npm run core:test && npm run client:test && npm run api:test
scripts.prebuild: npm run validate:data-contract && npm run build:indexes && npm run textbooks:relations:build && npm run textbooks:align-all && npm run textbooks:audit-align-all && npm run textbooks:public:build && npm run textbooks:public:audit && npm run prepare:pdfjs && npm run validate:data-trust && npm run build:knowledge-graph-preview && npm run validate:knowledge-graph-preview
